text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: I'm sorry... I couldn't guide you to victory.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
For one thing, I don't believe for a second that
we wasted our time by attempting this race... It is
a shame, but there's nothing to be glum about.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's always the next race, after all! Besides, I
don't have time to be wallowing in regret.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sure, losing is frustrating, but still! Being able to
run and compete against others is just so
wonderful... It's so much fun!
choice_data_list: I should've known you'd say something like that.
I should've known you'd say something like that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Besides, losing just means that I still have plenty
of potential left to tap into! ♪
choice_data_list: We just have to put our nose to the grindstone!
We just have to put our nose to the grindstone!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Besides, losing just means that I still have plenty
of potential left to tap into! ♪
choice_data_list: We just have to put our nose to the grindstone!
We just have to put our nose to the grindstone!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I can still get even stronger... Just wait
and see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's hit the track and get the next win! ♪ I want
to give you some wonderful memories too, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, what a strict trainer you are! Still... I guess
this means you've recovered your spirits.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, in that case, I'll just have to brace myself
for this "grindstone!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Let's win the next one, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's smile may be gentle, but beneath it
burns a fiery determination!
